description: Pumped up, colour blocked kicks from fila, this Cadillace pair references the splash and dash racing sport in its colour pattern and print. Wear this with casual ensembles for a party vibe.UpperSynthetic upper with strategically placed overlaysStitch detailing on the toe boxCentral lace-upsPadded tongueMeshed fabric inner with paddingSoft footbedMidsoleFoam midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardTyre tread pattern on the outsoleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
